description:
Operating Area: Croatia

The PACHA is a 28-meter-long wooden mahogany gulet with all the facilities and features to provide unforgettable sailing on the Adriatic Sea.

crew.name: Goran Krivić
crew.bio:
Captain Goran Krivić was born in 1971 and lives in Duce, in the heart of Dalmatia. He
has been associated with the sea and ships all his life. Sailing and boats are his passion.

As the captain and owner of his yacht he will ensure that your cruise to the most
beautiful sea in the world will be an unforgettable experience. Working closely with his guests he will give you insight into all the secrets of pleasant sailing, while at the same time fulfilling all your needs and desires.

Goran enjoys travelling and sharing his experiences with his guests who he feels are not just tourists or travellers to him, but partners embarking on a journey and sharing the emotions that only the sea can offer a person.

For Goran, planning and organising a variety of activities is one of his top priorities in making your stay on m/y PACHA as enjoyable as possible. His first and foremost goal is to ensure the satisfaction of his guests, thus regarding this more as pleasure than a job.

As an energetic and passionate person, Goran enjoys trekking in his free time. He is also an avid fan of old timers and Hajduk, a football club from Split. He and his wife Sladjana have three sons, Josip, Matej and Borna.

crew.name: Matej Krivić
crew.bio:
Matej was born in Split in 1998 and lives with his family in Duce. He is the son of a
ship owner.

During your vacation, you will get to know Matej as a young, spontaneous and highly
capable crew member, who is being groomed to one day take his father’s position at the helm of this unique yacht.

As an adrenaline enthusiast and experienced watersports expert, he will be your guide in all the adrenaline sports and activities that PACHA has to offer.

He is a hard-working member of our team and together with all our crew is at your
service to assist and make your journey as exciting and as pleasant as possible.

crew.name: Stefan Grbić
crew.bio:
Stefan Grbić, an accomplished chef with extensive experience in fine dining, Mediterranean cuisine, and luxury hospitality, is deeply passionate about high-quality ingredients.

Born in Serbia, he has honed his culinary skills in top-tier restaurants, exclusive residences, and private yachts, where this passion has driven his menu creation and innovative cooking techniques.

His culinary journey began at the High School of Tourism, where he majored in Gastronomy. Since then, he has worked across a variety of international kitchens, starting as a prep cook and progressing to head chef roles.

Stefan’s hands-on expertise in seafood preparation and fresh pasta making, along with his skills in menu development and the use of specialized equipment, has been honed at fine dining establishments like “Sweet Life” in the USA and the “European Union” Residence in Serbia.

Stefan also has experience as a private yacht chef, catering to elite clients, including Hollywood personalities and renowned chefs. His work on yachts like “Pasha” required precision, creativity, and excellent organizational skills, as he single-handedly managed provisioning, dietary requests, and gourmet meal preparation while at sea.

He has successfully catered to a variety of dietary restrictions and preferences, ensuring that every guest enjoys a delicious and satisfying meal.

Fluent in English and Serbian, Stefan excels in fast-paced, high-pressure environments, maintaining impeccable kitchen hygiene and ensuring that every dish meets the highest standards. Whether creating elegant tapas dishes, crafting innovative fusion menus, or executing large-scale receptions, he consistently delivers an exceptional dining experience.

With a dedication to continuous learning and culinary excellence, Stefan is always looking for new opportunities to push creative boundaries and elevate the art of fine dining. His commitment to growth and innovation ensures that he consistently delivers an exceptional dining experience.

crew.name: Mia Krivić
crew.bio:
Mia Krivić was born in Split and is a 24-year-old adventurous spirit with a passion for sailing and exploration.

She has been a valued member of the crew aboard the yacht Pacha for the past two years, consistently delivering exceptional service and contributing to an unforgettable experience for our guests.

Mia holds multiple roles, serving as a hostess, entrepreneur, and tourist guide, and she is available around the clock to ensure that your needs are met.

Her primary goal is to make guests feel as comfortable and relaxed as possible during their time aboard. Outside of her professional responsibilities, Mia has a deep love for animals, travel, reading, and spending quality time outdoors.

She is also skilled in creating delightful cocktails and desserts, enhancing the overall experience during your stay aboard Pacha.
